name: scallopbot
description: An economical and smart bot architecture

scripts.build:web: cd web && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:web && rm -rf dist && tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');function cpDir(s,t){fs.mkdirSync(t,{recursive:true});fs.readdirSync(s,{withFileTypes:true}).forEach(e=>{const sp=p.join(s,e.name),tp=p.join(t,e.name);e.isDirectory()?cpDir(sp,tp):fs.copyFileSync(sp,tp)})}fs.readdirSync('src/skills/bundled').forEach(d=>{const s=p.join('src/skills/bundled',d),t=p.join('dist/skills/bundled',d);if(fs.existsSync(p.join(s,'SKILL.md')))cpDir(s,t)})"
scripts.test:proactive: vitest run src/e2e/proactive-humanlike.test.ts src/memory/gap-scanner.test.ts src/memory/proactive-evaluator.test.ts src/memory/scheduled-item-state.test.ts src/proactive/message-quality.test.ts src/proactive/message-safety.test.ts src/proactive/timing-model.test.ts src/proactive/feedback.test.ts src/proactive/scheduler.test.ts src/proactive/scheduler-durable-task.test.ts src/channels/telegram-proactive-reply.test.ts
scripts.benchmark:intelligence: vitest run src/routing/routing-quality.test.ts src/memory/retrieval-quality.test.ts src/memory/semantic-index.test.ts src/proactive/feedback.test.ts src/proactive/message-safety.test.ts src/proactive/scheduler.test.ts src/security/redaction.test.ts src/skills/executor.test.ts src/routing/trace-tap.test.ts src/agent/tool-policy-dispatch.test.ts src/brain/outcome-brain.test.ts src/goals/verified-goal.test.ts src/goals/skill.test.ts src/workflow/executor.test.ts src/skills/bundled/mcp/mcp.test.ts src/evolution/fitness.test.ts src/evolution/privacy.test.ts src/evolution/verify.test.ts src/evolution/procedure-skill.test.ts src/evolution/optimizer.e2e.test.ts src/evolution/version-ledger.test.ts src/evolution/units.test.ts src/board/durable-workers.test.ts src/proactive/scheduler-durable-task.test.ts src/e2e/intelligence-scorecard.test.ts src/e2e/intelligence-regression.test.ts --reporter=verbose

author: Squarestock
